chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP NO.D-1590/2021 ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- Date Order with signature of Judge ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- 1. For hearing of MA No.6727/2021 2. For hearing of main case. 12.03.2024 Mr. Nabi Bukhsh advocate for petitioner. Mr. Muhammad Mansoor Mir advocate for respondent No.5. Ms. Naushaba Haq Solangi, AAG................ This petition pertain to direction to the Culture Department, Government of Sindh, to declare sir Henry Holland Eye Hospital Shikarpur as heritage and further seeks direction to the Chief Secretary Sindh to ensure that referred hospital is functional and shall not be commercialized/sold/converted into housing scheme or any other commercial project; further it is pleaded that there is apprehension that this old and historical Hospital which pertains to trust is heritage; respondents are going to demolish or change the status. 2. At this juncture learned counsel for respondent No.5 contends that originally this property was owned by hiranand, perhaps in 1946 donated the same to the society; that brother of the petitioner attempted to sell this property to one Muhammad Siddiq Shaikh however that registered deed was canceled vide letter dated 12.09.2006 (available at page 125). Accordingly District and Sessions Judge shall probe this issue with regard to title documents as well as possession with further clarification that any portion of that property has been converted into residential or commercial scheme or - { 2 } - occupied by encroachers, or whether this property pertains to public trust, established by late Hiranand. 3.

At this juncture learned counsel for respondent No.5 contends that originally this property was owned by hiranand, perhaps in 1946 donated the same to the society; that brother of the petitioner attempted to sell this property to one Muhammad Siddiq Shaikh however that registered deed was canceled vide letter dated 12.09.2006 (available at page 125). Accordingly District and Sessions Judge shall probe this issue with regard to title documents as well as possession with further clarification that any portion of that property has been converted into residential or commercial scheme or - { 2 } - occupied by encroachers, or whether this property pertains to public trust, established by late Hiranand. 3. Besides, Secretary Heath, Government of Sindh shall also visit sir Henry Holland Eye Hospital/hiranand hospital, Shikarpur dedicated/donated before partition and that whether Heath Department has contributed to maintain this old hospital and shall submit mechanism/proposal with consultation of the concerned stakeholder(s) to run this hospital by providing doctors and grant an aid. Deputy Commissioner Shikarpur and Culture Department shall also provide every assistance to the District and Session Judge and provide complete record pertaining to the hospital as referred above and shall visit the site. Learned MIT-II shall ensure compliance of this order through all modes including manual and digital. To come up on 21.03.2024 at 9.30 a.m. J U D G E J U D G E IK
